debug_info.goal:
k : ℕ
hk : 0 < k
S : Finset ℕ
hS : ∀ p ∈ S, Odd p ∧ Nat.Prime p
p₁ p₂ : Fin S.card ≃ ↥S
hp₁ : Imo2022P3.Condition k S p₁
hp₂ : Imo2022P3.Condition k S p₂
⊢ (∃ i, ∀ (j : Fin S.card), p₂ j = p₁ (j + i)) ∨ ∃ i, ∀ (j : Fin S.card), p₂ j = p₁ (j.rev + i)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
classical
  by_cases h : S.card = 0
  · left
    refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro j
    exfalso
    have : IsEmpty (Fin S.card) := by
      simpa [h] using (Fin.isEmpty_iff_eq_zero.mpr h)
    exact (isEmptyElim j)
  · by_cases h' : S.card = 1
    · left
      refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro j
      have hj : j = 0 := by
        ext
        have : (j : ℕ) < 1 := by simpa [h'] using j.isLt
        exact Nat.lt_one_iff.mp this
      subst hj
      have : (p₂ 0 : ℕ) = (p₁ 0 : ℕ) := by
        have hx₂ := hp₂ 0
        have hx₁ := hp₁ 0
        rcases hx₂ with ⟨x₂, hx₂pos, hx₂eq⟩
        rcases hx₁ with ⟨x₁, hx₁pos, hx₁eq⟩
        have h0 : (0 : Fin S.card) + 1 = 0 := by
          ext
          simp [Fin.add_def, h', Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
        have hx₂eq' : (p₂ 0 : ℕ) * (p₂ 0 : ℕ) = x₂ ^ 2 + x₂ + k := by
          simpa [h0] using hx₂eq
        have hx₁eq' : (p₁ 0 : ℕ) * (p₁ 0 : ℕ) = x₁ ^ 2 + x₁ + k := by
          simpa [h0] using hx₁eq
        have hmem₂ : (p₂ 0 : ℕ) ∈ S := by
          simpa using (p₂ 0).property
        have hmem₁ : (p₁ 0 : ℕ) ∈ S := by
          simpa using (p₁ 0).property
        have hprime₂ : Nat.Prime (p₂ 0 : ℕ) := (hS (p₂ 0 : ℕ) hmem₂).2
        have hprime₁ : Nat.Prime (p₁ 0 : ℕ) := (hS (p₁ 0 : ℕ) hmem₁).2
        have hpos₂ : 0 < (p₂ 0 : ℕ) := hprime₂.pos
        have hpos₁ : 0 < (p₁ 0 : ℕ) := hprime₁.pos
        have hsqrt₂ : (p₂ 0 : ℕ) = x₂ ^ 2 + x₂ + k := by
          have : (p₂ 0 : ℕ) = 1 := by
            have := Nat.mul_self_eq_mul_self_iff.mp (by
              simpa [pow_two] using congrArg (fun t => t) hx₂eq')
            cases this with
            | inl hEq => exact hEq
            | inr hEq =>
              have : (p₂ 0 : ℕ) = 0 := by
                have : (p₂ 0 : ℕ) + (p₂ 0 : ℕ) = 0 := by
                  simpa using congrArg (fun z => (p₂ 0 : ℕ) + z) hEq
                exact Nat.add_eq_zero_iff.mp this |>.1
              exact False.elim (Nat.ne_of_gt hpos₂ this)
          exact False.elim (hprime₂.ne_one this)
        exact False.elim (Nat.ne_of_gt hk (by simpa using hsqrt₂.symm))
      exact Subtype.ext (by simpa using this)
    ·
      left
      refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      intro j
      have : p₂ j = p₁ j := by
        have : S = S := rfl
        simp
      simpa using this
